entries.name: odlyzko_first_100k
entries.source: Odlyzko zeta zero tables, copied through historical lab outputs
entries.precision_note: Low-height table. Float summaries are less risky, but reproducible gap computations should use stored ordinates or offsets.
entries.commit_reproduction_note: Used in historical first_100k candidate and comparison outputs.

entries.name: odlyzko_around_1e12
entries.source: Odlyzko zeta zero tables, copied through historical around_1e12 lab outputs
entries.precision_note: Use base+offset arithmetic. Candidate A gaps must be computed from offsets, not by subtracting large float heights.
entries.commit_reproduction_note: Candidate A 1000000008625/1000000008626 is reproduced from historical around_1e12 artifacts.

entries.name: odlyzko_around_1e21
entries.source: Odlyzko zeta zero tables, copied through historical around_1e21 lab outputs
entries.precision_note: High-zero block with stronger source precision caution. Use base+offset arithmetic and endpoint uncertainty stress tests.
entries.commit_reproduction_note: Used for Candidate C and finite-flow comparison; ranking is precision-sensitive.

entries.name: candidate_comparison_processed_inputs
entries.precision_note: Curated processed summaries. Missing explicit-style gbar values are preserved as missing, not inferred.
entries.generated_by: Historical gap_energy_flow pipeline; copied into data/processed/candidate_comparison for public v0.1 defaults.

entries.name: outputs_candidate_comparison
entries.precision_note: Finite comparison over available candidates only. Finite-flow and neighbor correction are heuristic diagnostics.
entries.commit_reproduction_note: Refresh before release with riemann-lab compare-candidates.

entries.name: outputs_reproduction
entries.precision_note: Contains a mix of copied historical reports and newly generated outputs. Check each report for claim strength.
entries.commit_reproduction_note: Refresh before release when historical artifacts are available locally.

entries.name: riemann_hypothesis
entries.precision_note: This repository does not prove RH.
entries.commit_reproduction_note: Any RH claim should fail claim-language review.
